**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Project Kickoff
**Objective:** Finalize project scope, conduct stakeholder interviews, and complete access and compliance checklist.

Conduct interviews with stakeholders to understand their requirements and expectations from the project. Identify key performance indicators and success criteria.

## Deliverable
